CommonLII: Supreme Court of Singapore - Court of Appeal

Li Jialin and another v Wingcrown Investment Pte Ltd [2024] SGCA 48

IN THE COURT OF APPEAL OF THE REPUBLIC OF SINGAPORE

Court of Appeal / Civil Appeal No 5 of 2024

GROUNDS OF DECISION

Version No 1: 06 Nov 2024 (12:31 hrs)

The court considered the parties' sale and purchase agreement and the consequences of non-completion.
